name: Lintes Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Lintes Technology Co., Ltd. researches, designs, develops, and manufactures consumer electronics and communication connectivity products worldwide. The company offers active and passive electric cables, adaptors, travel docks, PD chargers, and dongles, as well as active optical and high-speed transmission cables. It serves original equipment manufacturers and original design manufacturers. Lintes Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2011 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
